title: Optimizium
description:
Optimizium is FULLY Optimized modpack with any additions for comfortable gaming experience. Modpack is based on Sodium.
Needs JDK 22 for C2M mod.
body:
Optimizium is Modpack for FULLY Optimization with any things for better gaming experience. If you have potato like PC, you should download it! You can use this modpack as a base for your projects or vanilla, but smoother gaming. Optimizium is tested and guarantees best, without any crashes experience. 
This modpack needs JDK 22!
Main mods:
1.Sodium
2.Entity Culling
3.More Culling
4.Indium
5.Concurrent Chunk Managemet 
\\\
1. Download Java 22 from Oracle
2. Install
3. Select the Java 22 version in modpack settings.
4. Have Fun!
